name: PrivacyPilot
tagline: Generate Play Store-compliant privacy policies from your AndroidManifest.xml in one command.
description: PrivacyPilot scans your AndroidManifest.xml and Gradle dependencies to automatically detect permissions and third-party SDKs (AdMob, Firebase, Crashlytics, etc.), then generates a fully compliant HTML privacy policy. Deploys directly to GitHub Pages following the SudarshanTechLabs URL pattern.
author: SUDARSHANCHAUDHARI

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Scan manifest + Gradle and generate a complete privacy policy HTML

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Audit an existing privacy policy for compliance gaps

commands.name: github-page
commands.description: Deploy the generated policy to GitHub Pages

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update an existing policy when permissions or SDKs change
